en.extract:
The Numfor leaf warbler (Phylloscopus maforensis) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Phylloscopidae.
It is endemic to Numfor in Indonesia.

The '''Numfor leaf warbler''' ('''''Phylloscopus maforensis''''') is a species of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Phylloscopidae]].
It is endemic to [[Numfor]] in [[Indonesia]].
